<!--
Thanks for helping improve KingshotAuto! Please remember this project is
early-stage and not all tasks work reliably yet. Before filing, search existing
issues to avoid duplicates. NEVER include secrets, passwords, or license/account
details in this report.
-->

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment

- **OS:** <!-- e.g. Windows 11 23H2 (x64) -->
- **.NET SDK version:** <!-- output of `dotnet --version` -->
- **LDPlayer version:** <!-- e.g. LDPlayer 9.x.x (64-bit) -->
- **App version / commit:** <!-- release version, or `git rev-parse --short HEAD` -->
- **Emulator resolution / DPI:** <!-- template matching is resolution-sensitive, so this matters -->
- **Running as Administrator?** <!-- yes / no -->

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Logs

Please attach or paste relevant logs from the app's `logs/` folder (remove anything sensitive first).

```
<paste logs here>
```

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots of the UI and/or the emulator screen to help explain the problem.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — which task(s) were running, whether it's intermittent, recent changes, etc.
